reference: It appears that I have an abscessed tooth. I got a bump on my gum four months ago and experienced pain. I then took antibiotics to eliminate the infection, but the small sac on my gum never went away. Now, four months later, pus is coming out when I press on it. I have been gargling with saltwater and I am going to see a dentist tomorrow. Will I lose my tooth because I waited so long?
text: It appears that I have been processed too thin. I got a bump on my forehead and a sore exterior to the knee. I then took antibiotics to eliminate the infection, but the small sap on my arm never went away. Now I'm on the same path. The hospice clinic is very aggressive. I have been gargling with salt water, and I am going to see if I can still get out of it. I will continue to take antibiotics.
